title: Blockchain.com confidentially files for US IPO as crypto firms continue public market push
message_html: Blockchain.com confidentially files for US IPO as crypto firms continue public market push ...
snippet: Blockchain.com confidentially filed with the SEC for an IPO, joining Circle, Gemini, and BitGo in crypto's sustained public markets push.

title: Boerse Stuttgart taps SocGen, flatexDEGIRO for EU blockchain settlement push
message_html: Boerse Stuttgart taps SocGen, flatexDEGIRO for EU blockchain settlement push ...
snippet: Boerse Stuttgart’s Seturion has partnered with Societe Generale, SG-FORGE and flatexDEGIRO to build a pan-European blockchain securities settlement system.
